name: Feature Registry
description: Maintains a persistent registry of codebase features with signatures, keywords, dependencies, and module membership. Provides feature lookup by task description or symbol name and builds context blocks for prompt injection.

Models/FeatureEntry.cs.content:
class FeatureEntry
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Description: string
  Category: string
  Keywords: List<string>
  PrimaryFiles: List<string>
  SecondaryFiles: List<string>
  RelatedFeatureIds: List<string>
  DependsOn: List<string>
  Context: FeatureContext
  ParentModuleId: string?
  ChildFeatureIds: List<string>
  HierarchyLevel: int
  SymbolNames: List<string>
  TouchCount: int
  PlaceholderCreatedAt: DateTime?
  LastUpdatedAt: DateTime
  LastUpdatedByTaskId: string?
class FeatureContext
  Signatures: Dictionary<string, FileSignature>
  KeyTypes: List<string>
  Patterns: List<string>
  Dependencies: List<string>
class FileSignature
  Hash: string
  Content: string

Models/FeatureIndex.cs.content:
class FeatureIndex

  Features: List<FeatureIndexEntry>
  Modules: List<ModuleIndexEntry>
class FeatureIndexEntry
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Category: string
  TouchCount: int
  PrimaryFileCount: int

patterns: Lazy signature refresh on stale hash detection
dependencies: Consumed by PromptBuilder for context injection
